calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement; Declaration Of N.P. Jellins In Support ; Memorandum Of Of Points And Authorties.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Advanced From Apr-22-13 To Apr-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement; Declaration Of N.P. Jellins In Support ; Memorandum Of Of Points And Authorties.
Off Calendar Apr-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicolas Jellins for and with Berniece Turner, Joyce Turner, and Leon Turner, Jr. Hilary Hedemark for and with Patsy Turner. Sharon Godbolt for Reverrand Leon Turner, Sr. (Trustor).

The Court expressed concern about Ms. Godbolt's Client with regard to the back and forth between homes. Ms. Godbolt stated that her Client would like to stay in touch with and see and visit with all of his Children, that he would like to see his Children in Palo Alto on the weekends so that he could attend Church, that it might be difficult for him to do that on a weekly basis and that he is satisfied with the terms of the settlement. Ms. Godbolt also stated that she has significant concern with the ability of the 9 Children to perform with the terms of the settlement. Mr. Turner, Jr. expressed concern about Bernice and Joyce not being able to obtain a loan to pay the $120,000.00 which is owed on the properties and due in November. Mr. Turner, Jr. also stated that there is no cooperation with the visitation schedule and that their Father is not provided with any funds when he is visiting in Palo Alto. Mr. Jellins explained that there is no signature on the settlement from Michael because he has no interest in the property. The Trust will pay $1,000.00 for the property taxes, and Bernice and Joyce will pay $3,000.00 (total of $4,000.00 is for property taxes on both properties). The Court granted the Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Ex Parte Application For Order Shrotening Time
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Continued To Apr-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Continued To Feb-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hillary Hedemark for Patsy Turner.

Ms. Hedemark stated that there was still no word from Martha, that Patsy has tried reaching Martha by phone and that all of the Siblings voiced that they had not heard from Martha in years. The Court granted the Ex Parte Petition for Appointment of Guardian Ad Litem (subject to review of the order). The Court also informed Counsel that a Petition for Approval of the Settlement Agreement was needed and that it should address the issue of Mr. Turner's (Senior) living arrangement, distribution/disposition of the properties (3) and Martha's interest. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Report and Account was continued to February 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 which will then be continued to the same hearing date given to the Petition for Approval of the Settlement Agreement.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Continued To Feb-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Nov-16-2012 Continued To Jan-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Continued To Nov-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Continued To Sep-14-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Jellins for and with Leon Turner, Jr., Bernice Turner, Joyce Turner and Michael Turner. Chris Norris for Patsy Turner (Respondent/Trustee). Rev. Leon turner, Sr. also present.

Mr. Jellins stated that they exercised all due diligence to locate Martha Ann Turner to no avail and that he will file an ex parte application for an order of service of publication or an order dispensing with notice. Concerns were raised with regard to the Trustee's apparent ability to dissipate the Trust in it's entirety, discretion to expend the assets, to collect rents ($600.00 from Joyce and $600.00 from Bernice), to not provide maintenance to the properties, borrowing money on the properties ($120,000.00 line of credit) and the Trustee selling the properties. The issues of standing, structure of the Trusts, family dynamics, and mediation were discussed. The Court signed an order offering Pro Bono Mediation (order signed in open Court). Mediation is to be completed by September 7, 2012 and the Parties are to report to the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by that same date. The Court suggested that Mr. Jellins make a list of all the issues. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Report and Account was continued to September 14, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a half day evidentiary hearing. The Parties stipulated that none of the properties are to be listed for sale and that if the Trustee intends to list a property, that they come before the Court for a status conference (Parties to reduce it to a written stipulation). Mr. Turner, Sr. stated that he was concerned about the issues and that he does not want to the sell the properties.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Continued To Jun-12-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Jellins for and with Leon Turner, Jr., Berniece Turner and Joyce Turner (Petitioners). Chris Norris for Patsy Turner (Respondent/Trustee).

The Court informed Counsel that Leon Turner, Sr. needs to be given notice. Mr. Jellins expressed his Clients' concerns. Mr. Norris stated that his Client is working with a Bookkeeper to prepare a quick book accounting. Mr. Jellins is asking for a Court accounting from 2002 to present. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Account was continued to June 12, 2012 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper notice to Leon Turner, Sr., to figure out what to do about Martha Turner, to have Patsy verify the response and to see what information Mr. Norris can provide to Mr. Jellins.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Continued To Apr-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Chris Norris for Patsy Turner (Trustee). Joyce Turner in Propria Persona. Bernice Turner in Propria Persona.

Attorney Nicholas Jellins was not present. The Court indicated that there were many issues with the petition and that Mr. Jellins needs to be present. Joyce Turner stated that they want the accounting to be in Court format, approved and under penalty of perjury. Mr. Norris expressed concern about expending Trust funds for preparation of an accounting. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Report and Account was continued to April 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Jellins is to be present.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella. Bailiff: Deputy R. Rosado.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Continued To Apr-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Jellins for Leon Turner, Jr. (Petitioner). Chris Norris for Respondent.

The issue on whether the Petitioner have standing to file this Petition was addressed. The Respondent is to file a response on or before April 11, 2012 and the matter was continued to April 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m.., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Compel Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Continued To Apr-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
